description_long: This sculpture depicts a realistic bust of a male figure, rendered with detailed facial features, short textured hair, and a strong jawline. The head is mounted on a circular base that extends outward in an irregular, organic pattern, suggesting a stylized pedestal or plinth. The surface appears to be made of a metallic material, with a slightly weathered, matte finish and subtle variations in tone. The facial expression is neutral, with the eyes gazing forward and the lips closed, conveying a sense of calm dignity. The back of the head and neck are smoothly modeled, with visible texturing to represent hair. The overall form is lifelike, with careful attention to anatomical proportions and surface detail.
description: A realistic metallic bust of a male figure with detailed facial features and short textured hair, mounted on an irregular circular base.
description_view_0: Left profile view showing the strong jawline, ear, and textured hair detail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, neck, and the organic extension of the base.
description_view_2: Right profile view with clear visibility of the facial structure and hair texture.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the full face, neutral expression, and symmetrical features.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
